tools.name: deploy_ai_api_gateway_v2
tools.description: Deploy AI API Gateway V2 — multi-provider routing (OpenAI/Anthropic/Google), semantic caching with Redis, circuit breakers, token metering, per-consumer rate limiting, APIM policies.

tools.name: evaluate_ai_api_gateway_v2
tools.description: Evaluate AI API Gateway V2 — cache hit rate, failover reliability, cost savings, latency distribution, rate limiting accuracy, provider health.

tools.name: tune_ai_api_gateway_v2
tools.description: Tune AI API Gateway V2 — provider routing priority, semantic cache TTL, circuit breaker thresholds, complexity routing rules, rate limit quotas, cost optimization.
